overview.description: Custom AI development company specializing in computer vision, NLP, and image authenticity solutions
overview.description_long: ImageMetry is a Prague-based AI development company founded in 2008 by a group of PhD researchers. For over 15 years they have helped businesses disrupt, accelerate and scale using advanced AI, computer vision, and NLP technologies. Their PhD-led R&D team has published extensively in peer-reviewed journals and won awards including the Czech Head award and a City of New York recognition. Key solutions include OCR, document understanding, image/video tampering detection, object detection, face recognition, and number plate recognition.
overview.tagline: AI, computer vision, NLP solutions that work and save you time & money.

history.origin_story: Founded in 2008 by a group of PhD researchers in Prague, building AI and computer vision solutions. Awarded by the City of New York and Czech Head award.

key_milestones.event: Founded in Prague by PhD researchers
Awarded by City of New York (Mayor Michael Bloomberg)
Awarded Czech Head award by Czech Republic Senate

awards: World Economic Forum – selected to contribute to UN ICT projects

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: ImageMetry provides custom AI consulting and development services. While foundation models are commoditizing some capabilities (OCR, NLP), the company's deep specialization in computer vision, image tampering detection, and niche research expertise (PhD-level team, peer-reviewed publications) provides differentiation. However, as AI tooling matures, clients may need less bespoke development.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: Custom AI consulting is a real and growing market, but it is highly competitive. The company serves many verticals without clear product specialization, which can make sales cycles long and margins thin. No public evidence of a flagship product or recurring revenue base.
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: Very small team (2-10 employees per LinkedIn), no known external funding, and no evidence of recurring revenue or major contracts. The company appears bootstrapped and relies on project-based consulting income, which creates significant runway risk.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: A very small, bootstrapped consulting firm with no known external funding and a small team. While their 15+ year track record and PhD-level expertise provide some defensibility, the lack of a scalable product, small employee count, and reliance on bespoke client engagements represent material risk.

metadata.notes: Company website describes 'over 15 years' of experience (founded 2008). LinkedIn shows 2-10 employee range with 2 visible employees. CEO Babak Mahdian and CTO Radim Nedbal identified from awards page. No CNAIP entry found.
